reason: Q asks the purposes for installing the sign; answer 5 = all of 1-4, which are the exact official purposes of В'їзд заборонено (3.21): prevent oncoming traffic on one-way roads, prevent driving against flow on a bus-lane road, separate entry/exit at parking/fuel stations, prevent entry to a separate lane. Image = red disc with white horizontal bar. NOTE: Wikimedia 'UA road sign 3.1.svg' is the plain red disc 'Рух заборонено' (wrong sign) — correct file is 'UA road sign 3.21.svg'. Verified via rendered PNG and official ПДР sources (green-way/vodiy).
